title: coix lacryma-jobi var. puellarum
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi var. puellarum, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of grass that is native to Asia and is a variety of the Coix lacryma-jobi plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Job's Tears include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Job's Tears can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is also sometimes used as a food ingredient in traditional Asian cooking.
